cards.title: Abyssal Trench Warden

ability.name: Pressure Shell
ability.text: Taunt. Armor 2: This unit reduces incoming damage by 2. While this unit has more than 5 health, it cannot be destroyed by spells.

cards.image_prompt: A massive, hulking entity made of jagged obsidian and glowing bioluminescent blue coral, standing in a deep ocean trench. It has thick, heavy plating and large crab-like pincers. Its glowing eyes pierce through the pitch-black water. Cinematic underwater lighting, volumetric bubbles, debris, moody and gothic.
cards.image_notes: Style: dark fantasy, hyper-realistic, 8k. Palette: dark navy, teal, bioluminescent neon blue. Negative prompts: text, watermarks, frame, cartoon, bright, sunny. Aspect ratio: 3:4
